title: Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates!
